title: Fix compact SpeakerN labels in RemoveSpeakerIdentifiersTranscriptFilter

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Started repro from failing e2e test. Will update RemoveSpeakerIdentifiersTranscriptFilter to strip compact labels like Speaker1: and validate with targeted pytest.

comments.author: derek
comments.text:
Patched RemoveSpeakerIdentifiersTranscriptFilter pattern to support compact labels like 'Speaker1:' in addition to 'Speaker 1:'. Added unit test coverage for compact form. Validation: .                                                                        [100%]
